title: Southpaw
subTitle: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

title: Mune
subTitle: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.

title: Speed Kills
subTitle: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: MN+ HD
subTitle: MN+ HD

title: Wild for the Night
subTitle: When an ex-convict returns home to solve his sister's murder, the authority forces him to go undercover to help them bust illegal activities at a night club.

title: Land of the Bears
subTitle: The filmmaker shines a light on the lives of five wild brown bears inhabiting the Kamchatka Peninsula, exploring their daily adventures and activities.

title: Texas Killing Fields
subTitle: In a small town in Texas, a homicide detective and his partner embark on a challenging mission to arrest a vicious serial killer.

title: Big Eyes
subTitle: Margaret Keane, a legendary painter, struggles to reclaim her fame after her husband takes the credit for her artwork.

title: The Company You Keep
subTitle: Grant, a wanted man and a former member of the revolutionary militant group, the Weather Underground, goes on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

title: The Great Gatsby
subTitle: Nick, a World War I veteran, moves to the state of New York where he meets Jay Gatsby, a mysterious millionaire whose extravagant parties and exuberant life interest him.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
subTitle: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

title: Boychoir
subTitle: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

title: Take Shelter
subTitle: Plagued by nightmares, Curtis builds a storm shelter, acting on visions that jeopardise his family's stability and harmony.

title: Gangs of New York
subTitle: After witnessing the horrifying murder of his father, a young man sets out to seek retribution and attempts to bring down a crime lord.

title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
subTitle: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
subTitle: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

title: Serena
subTitle: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

title: Fallen
subTitle: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

title: Speed Kills
subTitle: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

title: Woman in Gold
subTitle: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.

title: The Frozen Ground
subTitle: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
subTitle: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

title: The Da Vinci Code
subTitle: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

title: Lost River
subTitle: Billy, a struggling single mother, gets pulled into a dangerous underworld while her son discovers a hidden underwater town.

title: The Fugitive
subTitle: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

title: The Aviator
subTitle: Howard Hughes, a germaphobic inventor with mental illness, creates a new plane. Despite personal struggles, he also becomes a successful filmmaker, balancing aviation and Hollywood pursuits.

title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
subTitle: Charlie suffers from depression and is nervous about entering high school. However, with the help of two seniors, he learns how to deal with his struggles.

title: Silver Linings Playbook
subTitle: Pat, who is sent to a mental health facility after brutally attacking his wife's lover, walks out of the centre after eight months and meets Tiffany in a bid to mend ways with his wife.

title: Silver Linings Playbook
subTitle: Pat, who is sent to a mental health facility after brutally attacking his wife's lover, walks out of the centre after eight months and meets Tiffany in a bid to mend ways with his wife.

title: Stand Up Guys
subTitle: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

title: Texas Killing Fields
subTitle: In a small town in Texas, a homicide detective and his partner embark on a challenging mission to arrest a vicious serial killer.

title: Django Unchained
subTitle: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

title: The Family Fang
subTitle: After the police inform them about their parents' mysterious disappearance, two siblings embark on a mission to uncover the truth.

title: Side Effects
subTitle: When Emily's problems continue to haunt her, psychiatrist Jonathan Banks prescribes her a new drug. What follows not only leads to her husband's murder but also threatens to ruin Jonathan's career.

title: Boychoir
subTitle: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

title: Captain Phillips
subTitle: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

title: The Social Network
subTitle: In 2003, Harvard University sophomore, Mark Zuckerberg, creates the social networking platform called Facebook. But along with the popularity of the site he also gets dragged into two lawsuits.
